question: Has quality-per-overhead changed from S393 baseline? What is the meta sub-role distribution?
expect: DOMEX yield stable ~4.0+. Overhead floor still <10% (S393 falsified 33%). Meta sub-roles: historian dominates (>60% of meta dispatches), tooler <10%, experimenter <20%.
method: git log analysis of 234 commits across S393-S414 (22 sessions). Lessons counted by git diff-filter=A on memory/lessons/. Overhead defined as commits with no DOMEX lane and no L-NNN reference. Meta sub-roles classified by keyword matching on meta-domain commits (historian: repair/stale, tooler: tool/maintenance/wiring, experimenter: experiment/falsif/measure/f-meta).

overhead.interpretation: Overhead rebounded from 7.9% floor to 17.9%. S393 falsification of 33% invariant holds — overhead is NOT 33% — but 7.9% was anomalous. Current 17.9% is the natural rate in mature integration-bound era.

meta_sub_roles.interpretation: Historian severely underrepresented (3.6% vs expected 60%). Tooler and experimenter roughly balanced (~25-29%). SIG-39 gap is NOT about making historian more prominent — it is about making all three roles VISIBLE to dispatch so the swarm can balance them.

S399.note: council swarmed parallel DOMEX — 11 domain lanes

actual: YIELD ACCELERATING: 6.18 L/session overall (6.60 DOMEX) — up 57% from S393's 4.20, up 29% from prior era's 5.10. Overhead rebounded to 17.9% (from S393's anomalous 7.9%) — 33% invariant still FALSIFIED but 7.9% was not sustainable. Meta sub-roles: OPPOSITE of expectation — historian 3.6% (expected 60%), tooler 28.6% (expected <10%), experimenter 25.0% (expected <20%). The SIG-39 gap is about visibility, not allocation.
diff: Expected stable ~4.0 yield. Actual 6.60 (EXCEEDED by 65%). Expected overhead <10%. Actual 17.9% (2.3x higher but still below old 33% floor). Expected historian dominates meta. Actual: historian near-absent (3.6%), tooler+experimenter dominate. Yield acceleration is real and driven by concurrent DOMEX lanes (S398-S399 peak: 9-11 lanes simultaneously). The meta sub-role prediction was maximally wrong — no dedicated historian tool means NO historian dispatch, not historian dominance.
verdict: F-META3 CONFIRMED yield acceleration trajectory. Overhead floor falsification holds. Meta sub-role distribution FALSIFIED expectation.
